text:
Arkansas Symphony Orchestra, Philip Mann, Music Director Conductor, presents fourth concert 2018-2019 River Rhapsodies Chamber Music season with String Quartet, Tuesday, Feb. 26th 7:00 p.m. Clinton Presidential Center.
ASO's resident string quartets, Rockefeller String Quartet Quapaw String Quartet, will perform Janáček's "Kreutzer Sonata," Mozart's String Quartet
along with Puccini Verdi's string quartets.
Arkansas Symphony Orchestra's Quapaw String Quartet founded 1980 resident string quartet.
Responding what clearly statewide need, Winthrop Rockefeller Foundation began partnership 2000 form Rockefeller String Quartet.
quartets have developed reputation providing quality school programming, well performing statewide chamber ensemble with Arkansas Symphony.
quartets' primary responsibilities include string education outreach throughout state reaching more than 26,000 Arkansas school children each year.
